math_recheck: Re-derived against primary source KK_final.tex (arXiv 2203.17207): minimum-fragment containment T⊆Ŝ (minimality argument, verified element-wise), binomial bound binom(n,w+m)≤binom(n,w)(Lp)^{-m} (numerically checked, each factor ≤ n/w=1/(Lp)), geometric tail 2^ℓ L^{-0.9ℓ}/(1-1/L)≤L^{-0.8ℓ} requiring L^{0.1}>2 i.e. L>1024 (numerically checked), γ=Θ(logℓ) with late window Θ(√logℓ), capture induction, dichotomy, Markov step, and reduction (p'n=2m, singleton cover ⟹ nq>1/2) — all correct and faithful.
